claim_rule: claim candidate iff dev and test accuracy both exceed train-majority on the same split

feature_group_summaries.description: Generator profile indices only; diagnostic for source-order leakage.
Component material and local-move counts without board FEN features.

feature_group_summaries.control_scope: component metadata ablation without generator indices
feature_group_summaries.description: Component material, mobility, and recursive-node counts without board FEN features or profile indices.
All parsed component metadata without board FEN features.

feature_group_summaries.control_scope: signature metadata ablation without generator indices
feature_group_summaries.description: Board FEN plus parsed component metadata excluding generator profile indices.
Existing board FEN plus component signature metadata probe.

split_policy.dev: next 1/6 of rows by sha256(split_key), within exact.value.component_topology_family
split_policy.test: remaining rows by sha256(split_key), within exact.value.component_topology_family
split_policy.train: first 2/3 of rows by sha256(split_key), within exact.value.component_topology_family
